description_long: This object is a compact, box-shaped printer with a predominantly white exterior and green accent details. It features a sturdy frame with open front and back panels, allowing visibility and access to the internal print area, which includes green mechanical components and a flat print bed. The top surface displays printed graphics, including the text '3D' and other green symbols, suggesting its function as a 3D printer. Two robust handles with orange grips are mounted on opposite sides, enhancing portability. The front face has a recessed area with two blue indicator lights, likely representing the control interface or status indicators. The overall design is modern and functional, with a focus on accessibility and ease of use.
description: A compact, white box-shaped printer with green accents, open front and back, orange-handled sides, and visible internal print mechanisms. Features include a flat print bed, blue indicator lights, and printed graphics on the top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open print area, green internal components, and orange handle on top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the blue indicator lights, green accents, and the open structure of the print chamber.
description_view_2: Rear view with a clear look at the internal print area and the orange handle, similar to the front but without indicator lights.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with blue indicator lights and green accents, mirroring view 1 but with different top graphics visible.
attribute_brand_logo: Green printed logos and text are visible on the top surface, including '3D' and other symbols, located near the corners and edges. No specific brand name is discernible.
attribute_control_panel_design: A recessed area with two blue indicator lights is present on the front face, suggesting a minimalistic control interface. No physical buttons or screens are clearly visible.
attribute_print_bed_visibility: The print bed is visible through the open front and back panels, located centrally within the frame as a flat, dark surface.
